name: Swing 365 Golf
address: 14201 N May Ave ste 208, Oklahoma City, OK 73134
about: Swing 365 Golf provides members-only access to private, luxury indoor golf simulator suites in Oklahoma City. The facility operates on a 24/7 schedule and is equipped with professional-grade Full Swing simulators, allowing golfers to practice and play year-round without weather restrictions. Memberships are month-to-month with no long-term contracts, providing flexibility and convenience. The service is designed for serious golfers seeking an elevated, uncrowded environment to improve their game with premium technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Full Swing technology used by PGA Tour professionals
No crowds or wait times with a members-only environment
Ability to bring food and drinks to private sessions

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is welcome, no food service provided
Outside alcohol is welcome, no bar service provided

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade technology used by PGA Tour professionals with larger hitting area and real golf balls

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers must bring their own clubs as the facility does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, outside food and drinks are welcome in the private simulator rooms. No food or beverage service is provided.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes varies depending on the simulator software and player pace, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While the facility is private members-only, some reviews mention families enjoying the space with children. However, it is primarily designed for serious golf practice rather than a family entertainment center.
